title: Mineable Spawners
description: Makes spawners and trial spawners mineable (ONLY!) with a silk touch netherite pickaxe
body:
This data pack makes spawners and trial spawners obtainable only with silk touch.

Mining a spawner without silk touch will still yield xp.

Trial spawner mining speed unaffected.

Spawners do not drop their spawn eggs when mined.

Works well with my [Craftable Spawn Eggs](https://modrinth.com/datapack/craftable-spawneggs) data pack
